concentration_method: Qubit Fluorometer v.4 dsDNA high sensitivity kit
nucl_acid_ext_method_additional: Extractions performed by Tanner Waters and Carolina Fulginiti in the Robert Eagle laboratory at UCLA.
altitude_method: Calculated through substraction of measured depth from total water column depth.
recordedBy: Robert Eagle, Tanner Waters, Blanca Alvarez, Elijah Catalan
measurements_from: All environmental metadata measurements reported for this sample were taken from the bottle data file with the exception of sigma_theta, fluor, and redox_potential, which were derived from CTD downcast data.

geo_loc_name_method: Obtained using the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude coordinates to look up in the International Hydrographic Organization (IHO) geospatial World_Seas_IHO_v3 dataset.
samp_mat_process: Water samples were collected from the niskin then filtered through a 0.22 µm Sterivex filter taking "Total_Time_Filtering_min" min.
prep_method_additional: 100% molecular grade ethanol used for preservation
